description_long: This is a large, modern red SUV with a bold, angular design and a prominent chrome grille at the front. The vehicle features a panoramic sunroof, visible from the top, and silver roof rails running along both sides. The side profile reveals four passenger doors, flush door handles, and large, multi-spoke alloy wheels. Chrome accents are present along the window trim and lower door panels, adding a premium touch. The rear of the SUV is equipped with vertical taillights, a rear wiper, and a visible license plate. The windows are tinted, and the overall build suggests a spacious, comfortable interior suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A large, red, modern SUV with chrome accents, panoramic sunroof, and multi-spoke alloy wheels. Features four doors, tinted windows, and a bold front grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide chrome grille, angular headlights, and panoramic sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, chrome trim, large alloy wheels, and roof rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying vertical taillights, rear wiper, license plate, and sunroof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, alloy wheels, and chrome accents.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a dark metallic finish
